GP.label: Portrait of a Graduate
GP.intro: The knowledge, skills, and mindsets GUHSD aspires to develop in every graduate.

AP.label: Portrait of an Adult
AP.intro: What every adult in the GUHSD community — trustees, administrators, certificated and classified staff — needs to meet the promise of the Portrait of a Graduate.

SP.label: System Portrait
SP.intro: The conditions, partnerships, and policies GUHSD commits to building to support both the Portrait of a Graduate and the Portrait of an Adult.

elements.title: Active in the Pursuit of Their Intellectual Future
descriptors: Academically prepared to continue learning — gathering, organizing, and synthesizing information from many sources using a variety of tools, including AI.
Able to apply knowledge and skills to real-world situations, integrating learning across content areas with confidence to meet unknown future challenges.
Comfortable and confident with current and emerging technology, including AI and machine learning — and understand digital ethics and protecting their digital identity.
Able to craft meaningful questions and prompts, refining and reframing them to improve responses, including those from AI.

elements.title: Community Minded Citizen and Globally Aware
descriptors: Actively engaged, responsible citizens who understand government structures and the importance of civic responsibility.
Aware of the interconnection between environment and society, and how sustainability practices address human impact.
Globally aware, understanding current events and their potential impact on our country and communities.
Welcome cultural diversity, with respect and appreciation for other people's cultures, beliefs, and values.

elements.title: Creative Problem Solver & Critical Thinker
descriptors: Creative, innovative problem solvers who can design and evaluate solutions for unpredictable, complex, real-world problems.
Analytical and critical thinkers who gather, analyze, and evaluate information from a variety of sources, including media and online sources.
Able to distinguish fact from fiction and identify bias — including verifying information generated by AI.

elements.title: Effective Communicator
descriptors: Respectfully communicate with people from different cultures and beliefs, engaging in civil discourse and using digital tools, including social media, in healthy ways.
Effectively articulate their own thoughts, beliefs, and opinions — organizing ideas clearly in writing and craft arguments supported by reliable evidence.
Strong interpersonal communicators who can hold a face-to-face conversation with people of all ages and backgrounds and actively listen to understand others.

elements.title: Healthy and Self-Aware
descriptors: Aware of and take care of their mental and physical health, with strategies for managing stress and maintaining a healthy lifestyle.
Able to recognize and manage their emotions, developing coping skills and advocating for their own needs.
Self-aware and self-motivated — confident in their strengths and weaknesses, resilient, and willing to ask for help.

elements.title: Kind, Mature Adult
descriptors: Empathetic and compassionate, genuinely caring for others including those of different cultures and backgrounds.
Know how to develop and maintain healthy relationships, with the social and interpersonal skills to connect with a variety of people.
Independent and prepared to thrive as adults, with the everyday life skills to function and live independently.
Financially literate — understanding money management, credit, debt, and taxes.

elements.title: Openminded, Lifelong Learner
descriptors: Committed to personal and intellectual growth, curious and willing to explore new ideas — able to use technology, including AI, to investigate and verify their understanding.
Believe intelligence and skills grow through effort and learning, persisting through failure and seeking feedback to improve.
Open to and accepting of different perspectives, flexible in their thinking and able to adapt to new ideas and circumstances.

elements.title: Responsible and Collaborative Team Player
descriptors: Respectful, responsible team players who cooperate with people of different perspectives and take responsibility for team outcomes.
Honest, reliable leaders who understand group dynamics, can mediate conflicts, and hold themselves accountable for their mistakes.

elements.title: Adaptable, Lifelong Learner
descriptors: Open-minded, lifelong learners who value education and are committed to learning with and from students.
Flexible in their thinking and adaptable to new ideas, approaching change with curiosity.
Believe improvement comes from effort and learning — accepting of feedback, including from students, and engaging in self-reflection.
Technologically adaptive, able to adjust to quickly changing tools including AI, and know how to leverage technology to support student learning.

elements.title: Analytical and Collaborative Educator
descriptors: Creative, collaborative problem solvers who can proactively identify issues and resolve conflicts effectively and peacefully.
Critical and analytical thinkers with good decision-making skills, applying sound data analysis to inform their decisions.
Willing to lead and take ownership of their decisions, holding themselves accountable to colleagues, administrators, and the public.

elements.title: Community Minded, Globally Aware
descriptors: Community-oriented, aware of and respectful toward the diverse cultures that make up their school community.
Stay informed on local, national, and global events, able to seek reliable information and recognize misinformation, including from AI.
Demonstrate a willingness to engage and connect with their school community, building trust with students, families, and colleagues.

elements.title: Creates Safe Learning Environment for All Students
descriptors: Foster a safe learning space where every student feels accepted and valued, with clear expectations and positive interventions.
Believe in the potential of every student, using a student-centered, personalized approach that values growth at each student's own pace.
Understand the importance of students' mental health and well-being, recognizing bullying and using trauma-informed approaches.

elements.title: Effective and Inclusive Communicator
descriptors: Effective, adaptive communicators who select the right format — written, verbal, or digital — for their audience.
Active listeners who model strong interpersonal communication and support students in developing face-to-face conversation skills.
Inclusive communicators who use multilingual skills and technology, including AI, to help eliminate language barriers.

elements.title: Patient and Compassionate Mentor
descriptors: Committed to developing graduates prepared to navigate adult life, fostering students' independence and healthy relationships.
Approachable and able to relate to students, building healthy relationships and treating everyone with care and respect.
Positive, inspiring mentors — kind, empathetic role models who encourage students to persist and succeed.

elements.title: Relevant and Future Focused
descriptors: Optimistic educators who ensure access and opportunity for every student and understand the unique learning needs of each generation.
Adaptable and flexible in their instructional approach, staying informed about current and future trends in education.
Engage students in relevant, real-world learning through innovative lessons and hands-on projects.
Thoughtfully integrate technology, including AI, to support instructional goals and improve student learning.

elements.title: Self-Aware Professional
descriptors: Self-aware and emotionally intelligent, with a clear understanding of their impact on students and colleagues.
Aware of their own mental and physical health, knowing how to maintain balance between work and personal life.
Professionally prepared, aware of their own bias, and committed to integrity and ethical behavior.
Resilient and determined to help students thrive, modeling perseverance through challenges.
Dedicated, motivated, and passionate about providing a relevant, meaningful experience for every student.

elements.title: Communicative and Collaborative Community Partner
descriptors: A proactive communicator using clear, accessible, transparent language as the foundation of its partnerships with parents, families, and the community.
Works to establish collaborative educational partnerships that support the real-world education of all students.
Engages actively with its communities, serving as a hub and promoting community service for all students.
Partners with feeder districts to align academic expectations and ensure student success.

elements.title: Effective, Forward-Thinking District
descriptors: Hires and develops highly qualified professionals, providing resources and support for continued growth.
Committed to data-informed decision-making, seeking out and valuing student voice in the process.
Flexible and forward-thinking, able to adapt to a dynamic world through creative, innovative problem solving.
Encourages investigation of new and emerging technology, including AI, to enhance and support student learning.
Supports flexible curriculum and relevant instruction that responds to students' current needs.

elements.title: Prepares Students for Their Future
descriptors: Provides a variety of pathways and opportunities — college, vocational/trade school, military, workforce, or personalized alternatives.
Focuses on character building, adult life skills, and financial literacy so graduates are prepared to live independently.
Provides opportunities for students to develop the social skills and emotional intelligence needed for healthy relationships.
Supports instruction in the appropriate, ethical use of new and emerging technology, including AI.

elements.title: Prioritizes Health
descriptors: Recognizes the importance of the health and well-being of all students and staff, providing resources and proactive education.
Prioritizes mental health, providing access to mental and emotional health experts and education on stress management and work/life balance.

elements.title: Promotes a Welcoming and Inclusive Culture
descriptors: A kind, empathetic district that treats all students and staff with respect, compassion, and understanding.
Promotes a welcoming, accepting culture where every student and staff member feels valued and included.
Committed to giving students voice and choice in their educational plan, personalized around their interests and goals.
Creates and maintains a safe learning environment with a zero-tolerance policy that actively addresses bullying.

elements.title: Robust, Diverse, Versatile Course Offerings
descriptors: Offers a variety of real-world courses with curriculum that reflects modern life and lets staff teach their passions.
Offers CTE courses and pathways across all campuses, ensuring access regardless of home campus.
Provides a robust offering of electives and specialized courses — performing arts, world languages, and emerging technology including AI and robotics.
Provides opportunities for advanced coursework and college credit through dual-enrollment partnerships.

elements.title: Supports Innovative Pedagogical Practices
descriptors: Supports and encourages teachers to rethink instructional and assessment practices, providing time and resources to do so.
Supports authentic, hands-on, project-based learning opportunities for every student.
Supports collaboration as an instructional approach, including districtwide interdisciplinary projects.
Supports the integration of technology, including AI, in daily teaching and learning across all disciplines.

elements.title: Updated and Well-Maintained Facilities
descriptors: Dedicated to modern, flexible learning spaces that support new and emerging technology.
Creates and maintains collaborative workspaces for students and staff to investigate and explore.
Maintains green spaces and shade structures on every site for year-round use.

elements.title: Values Alternative Pathways
descriptors: Provides and supports multiple pathways to graduation, including alternative and student-tailored academic pathways.
Promotes and supports district-wide vocational and trade pathways leading to certification or apprenticeship.
Develops multiple career pathways through partnerships with businesses and industries, including internships and mentorship.
